What we do

Core logistics services

From vessel arrival at Mombasa Port to final delivery across the border — one accountable team handles documentation, customs, haulage and demurrage control.

🛃

Customs Clearance

Entry lodgement, tax computation, KRA & SSRA processing, verification and release at Mombasa Port, ICD Nairobi and all corridor borders.

🚢

Sea Freight

FCL & LCL bookings with MSC, Maersk, CMA-CGM, PIL and Hapag-Lloyd — negotiated rates and up to 45 transit free days.

🚛

Road Transport & Haulage

Container haulage on the Northern Corridor with vetted transporters, GPS visibility and 70/30 staged transporter payments.

🛄

Transit & Bonded Cargo

Bond execution, T1 documentation, customs escorts and bonded warehousing for cargo transiting Kenya to South Sudan, Uganda & DRC.

Popular
🏭

Warehousing & CFS

Trusted CFS partners in Mombasa — Compact, NFT, LPC Global — with storage planning that keeps demurrage and rent off your invoice.

📦

Door-to-Door Delivery

Single quote covering ocean leg, clearance, transport and last-mile delivery to Juba, Kampala, Kigali or Goma.

All 10 services →

Why SUDD

We clear cargo like it's our own money on the line

  • Demurrage is managed, not apologised for. Every container has a tracked last free day, tier rates and an escalation plan before problems arise.
  • Licensed & bonded. Registered clearing agents with active customs bonds for transit cargo across all border posts.
  • Border presence, not promises. Our own people at Malaba and Nimule — no waiting for a third party to answer the phone at midnight.
  • Transparent costing. Quote, expenses and final reconciliation per container. You see exactly what you pay for.
  • Real-time status updates. Every file tracked from entry lodgement to empty return — shared with you, not filed away.

Corridor transit times

Mombasa → Nairobi (SGR rail)2–3 days
Mombasa → Malaba border3–4 days
Malaba → Nimule border2–3 days
Nimule → Juba delivery1–2 days
Port clearance (docs ready)2–4 days
Door-to-door MSA → Juba 10–14 days

Home / Services

Services built for the corridor

Ten integrated services, one accountable team. Every service ends the same way: cargo delivered, file reconciled, no surprise invoice.

How a clearance runs

Our 6-step clearance workflow

The same disciplined sequence on every file — it's how we keep 98% of containers inside free time.

Start your clearance →

1 · Documents in

BL, invoice, packing list & permits received and verified before vessel arrival.

2 · Entry lodged

Customs entry created, taxes computed and shared with client for approval.

3 · Taxes paid & released

Payment confirmed, container release secured, CFS nominated.

4 · Loaded & in transit

Container loaded, vetted transporter dispatched, GPS link shared with you.

5 · Borders cleared

Malaba / Nimule processed same-day by our resident border teams.

6 · Delivered & reconciled

POD collected, empty returned, deposit refunded, final statement issued.

Need a service combination priced?

Most clients combine sea freight + clearance + transit haulage. We quote it as one number.

Request a combined quote

    Status definitions

    The 9 stages every file passes

    Wherever your cargo is, it's in exactly one of these stages — and you'll know which one before we do anything else.

    Stage 1Entry Created
    Stage 2Entry Released
    Stage 3Tax Generated
    Stage 4Tax Paid
    Stage 5Released
    Stage 6Loaded
    Stage 7In Transit
    Stage 8Border Cleared
    Stage 9Delivered & Empty Returned — file closed, deposit refunded

    Cargo details

    Home / About us

    Built at the border,
    run from the port

    SUDD Logistics Limited is a clearing & forwarding company headquartered in Mombasa and Nimule, with operations along the full Northern Corridor into South Sudan.

    Our story

    Why we exist

    The Mombasa–Juba corridor is one of the hardest trade lanes in Africa: two customs regimes, two border posts, demurrage tariffs that triple after day 14, and cargo owners who too often find out about problems only after the invoice arrives.

    SUDD was founded by operators who worked that corridor file by file. We built our own management system tracking every container's costs, free days and profit — and we run our clients' cargo with the same discipline we'd apply to our own.

    • Vision: the most trusted logistics partner on the Northern Corridor.
    • Mission: move cargo predictably — fixed quotes, visible status, zero surprise costs.
    • Values: transparency, urgency, accountability and border-level presence.

    Operational coverage

    🇰🇪 KenyaMombasa HQ · Nairobi
    🇺🇬 UgandaMalaba · Busia · Kampala
    🇸🇸 South SudanNimule · Juba
    🇹🇿 TanzaniaDar es Salaam (partner)
    🇷🇼 RwandaKigali (partner)
    🇨🇩 DRCGoma · Bunia (partner)
    🇿🇲 ZambiaProject cargo on request
    Milestones

    The road so far

    01

    Founded in Mombasa

    Licensed as forwarding agents; first transit files to Juba cleared through Nimule border.

    02

    Border teams placed

    Permanent staff at Malaba and Nimule cut average border dwell to under 24 hours.

    03

    Own management system

    Per-container costing, demurrage tiers and free-day tracking — live on every client file.

    04

    Multi-line partnerships

    Negotiated rates with MSC, Maersk, CMA-CGM, PIL and Hapag-Lloyd, up to 45 transit free days.

    Licences & compliance

    Certified to handle your cargo

    📜

    Licensed C&F agent

    Registered clearing & forwarding agent in Kenya with active KRA Simba / iCMS access and valid practising certificate.

    🔏

    Customs bonds

    Active transit bonds for bonded cargo moving through Kenya to all neighbouring states.

    🤝

    Association member

    Member of the national freight forwarders association; SSRA-registered for South Sudan customs entries.
